ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Hired"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Rejected"), ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Withdrawn") ), OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Final_Decision__c)), ISBLANK(Decision_Date__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Final Decision and Decision Date are required for Hired/Rejected/Withdrawn.
